'''鈭歷-dh-g-l''' ('''kavadhgeloko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:brandle|brandle]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-dh-g-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:brandle|brandle]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歷-dh-g-l
|-
! Lemma
| kavadhgeloko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thivadhgeloko|thivadhgeloko]] || [[word:jivadhgeloko|jivadhgeloko]] || [[word:shivadhgeloko|shivadhgeloko]] || [[word:kivadhgeloko|kivadhgeloko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuvadhgeloko|thuthuvadhgeloko]] || [[word:jujuvadhgeloko|jujuvadhgeloko]] || [[word:shushuvadhgeloko|shushuvadhgeloko]] || [[word:kukuvadhgeloko|kukuvadhgeloko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙vadhgeloko|th忙vadhgeloko]] || [[word:j忙vadhgeloko|j忙vadhgeloko]] || [[word:sh忙vadhgeloko|sh忙vadhgeloko]] || [[word:k忙vadhgeloko|k忙vadhgeloko]]
|-

=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
